positive.stdout:
% Refutation found. Thanks to Tanya!
% SZS status Theorem for pos
% SZS output start Proof for pos
2. published_by(neapolitan_chronicles,new_vessel_press) [input(axiom)]
4. ! [X0] : (published_by(X0,new_vessel_press) => english(X0)) [input(axiom)]
6. english(neapolitan_chronicles) [input(conjecture)]
7. ~english(neapolitan_chronicles) [negated conjecture 6]
8. ~english(neapolitan_chronicles) [flattening 7]
10. ! [X0] : (english(X0) | ~published_by(X0,new_vessel_press)) [ennf transformation 4]
14. published_by(neapolitan_chronicles,new_vessel_press) [cnf transformation 2]
16. ~published_by(X0,new_vessel_press) | english(X0) [cnf transformation 10]
17. ~english(neapolitan_chronicles) [cnf transformation 8]
18. english(neapolitan_chronicles) [resolution 16,14]
20. $false [forward subsumption resolution 18,17]
% SZS output end Proof for pos
% Termination reason: Refutation

negative.stdout:
